transcript: Speaker A (AI): ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ, ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರೇನು? [Hello, what is your name?] Speaker B (Human): My name is Gowri. Speaker A (AI): ನಿಮ್ಮ ವಯಸ್ಸೆಷ್ಟು? [How old are you?] Speaker B (Human): I have 30. Speaker A (AI): "I have 30" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am 30 years old" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ["I have 30" is incorrect, you should say "I am 30 years old".] Speaker B (Human): Okay okay, I am 30 years old. Speaker A (AI): ನೀವು ಎಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಬಂದಿದ್ದೀರಿ? [Where are you from?] Speaker B (Human): I am Kodagu. Speaker A (AI): "I am Kodagu" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am from Kodagu" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ["I am Kodagu" is incorrect, you should say "I am from Kodagu".] Speaker B (Human): ಓ ಸರಿ ಸರಿ. ನನಗೆ English ಅಷ್ಟು ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Oh okay, okay. I don't know English that well.] Speaker A (AI): ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ, AI Teachers ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [No problem, have you tried AI Teachers?] Speaker B (Human): ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಹಣ ಬೇಕಾಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That requires a lot of money, right?] Speaker A (AI): ಇಲ್ಲವೇ ಇಲ್ಲ. Normal English classes ಗಿಂತ 7 ಪಟ್ಟು ಚೀಪ್. ಅದಕ್ಕಾಗಿಯೇ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Not at all. It's 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing with me on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): ಆದ್ರೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] Speaker A (AI): ದಿನಾ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ confidence ಹೆಚ್ಚಾಗ್ತದೆ. [Just practicing 15 minutes a day is enough, confidence will increase slowly.] Speaker B (Human): Wow, ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Wow, how to join?] Speaker A (AI): ಕೆಳಗಿನ install button ಪ್ರೆಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ MySivi app ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡಿ, sign up ಮಾಡಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ. 1 ತಿಂಗಳಿನಲ್ಲಿ improvement ಕಾಣುತ್ತದೆ. [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing. You will see improvement in 1 month.] Trial version 3 ದಿನಗಳಿಗೆ ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿ. ಈಗಲೇ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [Trial version is just 1 rupee for 3 days. Start now.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: "ENGLISH ಬರಲ್ಲ" [Don't know English], "ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ, ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರೇನು?" [Hello, what is your name?], "MY NAME IS GOWRI", "ವಯಸ್ಸೆಷ್ಟು?" [How old?], "I HAVE 30", "30" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I AM 30 YEARS OLD" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not "30", say "I AM 30 YEARS OLD".], "OKAY OKAY, I AM 30 YEARS OLD", "ನೀವು ಎಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಬಂದಿದ್ದೀರಿ?" [Where are you from?], "I AM KODAGU", "I AM KODAGU" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I AM FROM KODAGU" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not "I AM KODAGU", say "I AM FROM KODAGU".], "ಸರಿ ಸರಿ. ನನಗೆ ENGLISH ಅಷ್ಟು ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ." [Okay okay. [IMPROVEMENT is seen in 1 Month.], "Sale Ends Today", "IVAGALE UNLOCK MADI" [UNLOCK NOW], "3 Dinakke ₹1" [3 Days for ₹1], "Nantara ₹299/month" [Afterwards ₹299/month], "Yavagadaru cancel madi" [Cancel anytime], "MySivi Pro Prayojanagalu" [MySivi Pro Benefits], "24/7 Personal AI English", "Offer ends in 09:58", "Pay using PhonePe", "Start Trial at ₹1", "MySivi English speaking app Install Now"
summary: A woman who struggles with English is corrected gently by an AI avatar on a screen. The ad highlights MySivi as an affordable, convenient AI English learning app that builds confidence with just 15 minutes of daily practice. Viewers are prompted to install the app and start a 3-day trial for ₹1.
